name: Shippo
description: Multi-carrier shipping API with 40+ providers. Create shipments, compare rates, purchase labels, track packages, handle customs, and manage carrier accounts.

capabilities.name: addresses_list
capabilities.description: List all address objects in the account.

capabilities.name: addresses_create
capabilities.description: Create a new address object.

capabilities.name: addresses_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve an address by object ID.

capabilities.name: addresses_validate
capabilities.description: Validate an existing address.

capabilities.name: parcels_create
capabilities.description: Create a parcel with dimensions and weight.

capabilities.name: parcels_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a parcel by object ID.

capabilities.name: shipments_list
capabilities.description: List all shipments.

capabilities.name: shipments_create
capabilities.description: Create a shipment to get rates from multiple carriers.

capabilities.name: shipments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a shipment by object ID.

capabilities.name: rates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific rate by object ID.

capabilities.name: rates_list_for_shipment
capabilities.description: Get all rates for a shipment.

capabilities.name: transactions_list
capabilities.description: List all label purchase transactions.

capabilities.name: transactions_create
capabilities.description: Purchase a shipping label from a rate.

capabilities.name: transactions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a transaction (label purchase) by ID.

capabilities.name: tracking_get
capabilities.description: Get tracking status for a shipment.

capabilities.name: tracking_create
capabilities.description: Register a tracking webhook for a shipment.

capabilities.name: customs_items_create
capabilities.description: Create a customs item for international shipments.

capabilities.name: customs_declarations_create
capabilities.description: Create a customs declaration for international shipments.

capabilities.name: refunds_create
capabilities.description: Request a refund for a purchased label.

capabilities.name: refunds_list
capabilities.description: List all refund requests.

capabilities.name: refunds_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a refund by object ID.

capabilities.name: manifests_create
capabilities.description: Create a manifest (SCAN form) for carrier pickup.

capabilities.name: manifests_list
capabilities.description: List all manifests.

capabilities.name: manifests_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a manifest by object ID.

capabilities.name: carrier_accounts_list
capabilities.description: List all carrier accounts.

capabilities.name: carrier_accounts_create
capabilities.description: Connect a new carrier account.

capabilities.name: carrier_accounts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a carrier account by ID.

capabilities.name: carrier_accounts_update
capabilities.description: Update a carrier account.

capabilities.name: batches_create
capabilities.description: Create a batch for bulk label purchasing.

capabilities.name: batches_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a batch by object ID.

capabilities.name: batches_purchase
capabilities.description: Purchase labels for all valid shipments in a batch.

capabilities.name: orders_list
capabilities.description: List all orders.

capabilities.name: orders_create
capabilities.description: Create a new order to fulfill.

capabilities.name: orders_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve an order by object ID.

capabilities.name: pickups_create
capabilities.description: Schedule a carrier pickup.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all webhooks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook for event notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.
